auth.label: API Key
auth.description: GenderAPI.io API key passed with the key query parameter. Register for an account and manage your key in the GenderAPI.io app: https://app.genderapi.io/user/register

actions.name: get_gender_by_email_address
actions.description: Infer the likely gender for one email address after GenderAPI.io extracts a name from it.

emailAddress.description: The email address to classify with GenderAPI.io.

country.description: The optional ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code used to localize the request.

askToAI.description: Whether GenderAPI.io should ask its AI model when the extracted name is missing from the database.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for inferring gender from an email address.

status.description: Indicates that GenderAPI.io processed the request successfully.

q.description: The original query value echoed back by GenderAPI.io.

name.description: The matched or extracted first name returned by GenderAPI.io.

anyOf.description: GenderAPI.io could not determine the gender.

gender.description: The inferred gender value returned by GenderAPI.io.

country.description: The country code used or inferred by GenderAPI.io.

probability.description: The confidence score from 0 to 100 returned by GenderAPI.io.

total_names.description: The number of matching name samples used by GenderAPI.io.

used_credits.description: The number of credits consumed by this request.

remaining_credits.description: The credits remaining after this request.

expires.description: The Unix timestamp when the current package expires.

duration.description: The server-side processing time returned by GenderAPI.io.

outputSchema.description: A normalized gender inference result returned by GenderAPI.io.

actions.name: get_gender_by_first_name
actions.description: Infer the likely gender for one first name with optional country and AI fallback hints.

firstName.description: The first name to classify with GenderAPI.io.

country.description: The optional ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code used to localize the request.

askToAI.description: Whether GenderAPI.io should ask its AI model when the name is missing from the database.

forceToGenderize.description: Whether GenderAPI.io should still guess a gender for unusual or non-human-looking names.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for inferring gender from a first name.

status.description: Indicates that GenderAPI.io processed the request successfully.

q.description: The original query value echoed back by GenderAPI.io.

name.description: The matched or extracted first name returned by GenderAPI.io.

anyOf.description: GenderAPI.io could not determine the gender.

gender.description: The inferred gender value returned by GenderAPI.io.

country.description: The country code used or inferred by GenderAPI.io.

probability.description: The confidence score from 0 to 100 returned by GenderAPI.io.

total_names.description: The number of matching name samples used by GenderAPI.io.

used_credits.description: The number of credits consumed by this request.

remaining_credits.description: The credits remaining after this request.

expires.description: The Unix timestamp when the current package expires.

duration.description: The server-side processing time returned by GenderAPI.io.

outputSchema.description: A normalized gender inference result returned by GenderAPI.io.

actions.name: get_gender_by_username
actions.description: Infer the likely gender for one username or nickname with optional country and AI fallback hints.

username.description: The username or nickname to classify with GenderAPI.io.

country.description: The optional ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code used to localize the request.

askToAI.description: Whether GenderAPI.io should ask its AI model when the username cannot be resolved from the database.

forceToGenderize.description: Whether GenderAPI.io should still guess a gender for unusual usernames.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for inferring gender from a username or nickname.

status.description: Indicates that GenderAPI.io processed the request successfully.

q.description: The original query value echoed back by GenderAPI.io.

name.description: The matched or extracted first name returned by GenderAPI.io.

anyOf.description: GenderAPI.io could not determine the gender.

gender.description: The inferred gender value returned by GenderAPI.io.

country.description: The country code used or inferred by GenderAPI.io.

probability.description: The confidence score from 0 to 100 returned by GenderAPI.io.

total_names.description: The number of matching name samples used by GenderAPI.io.

used_credits.description: The number of credits consumed by this request.

remaining_credits.description: The credits remaining after this request.

expires.description: The Unix timestamp when the current package expires.

duration.description: The server-side processing time returned by GenderAPI.io.

outputSchema.description: A normalized gender inference result returned by GenderAPI.io.
